proposal_patch.apply_mode: ordinary contextual unified diff, applied after the post-FORM2 case-intent patch and only after exact owner approval

conformance_cases.assessment: The proposal requests zero expected-verdict or runnable-status changes. It separately requests the exact three-path syntax repair, 274-path combined FORM-2 migration, five-path post-FORM2 case-intent repair, and nine manifest-description repairs recorded above. A-01 formalizes the already-positive mutual-recursion case. No other protected source edit is proposed.
conformance_cases.deref_source_path_inventory_encoding: UTF-8 paths sorted bytewise, each followed by LF

frozen_oracles.assessment: No frozen oracle source or pinned digest edit is proposed. Their exact current bytes are preserved through installation.

reference_semantics_tests.assessment: No existing reference-semantics test is changed, deleted, or weakened. Successor-only evidence is additive and lives outside this protected file.

selection_grounds.reason: Two structurally independent parsers and renderers bind the complete protected inventory and agree on the exact repair and migration patch bytes.
The static strong-LL(2) auditor and independent generalized parser measure terminal competition and complete derivation counts.
GRAM-2 is the unique owner of doc; only the wrong cross-reference changes.

The Python model performs exact-rational canonical search and membership. Rust independently extracts and pins the exact FORM-5/FORM-7 clauses and lexical grammar and rejects hostile clause mutations; it is not a second exact-rational canonicality implementation. Mathematical well-ordering supplies totality and uniqueness.
The unchanged const and cvalue shapes move to their unique semantic rule owners instead of remaining definitions under GRAM-3.

Delivery is relative to the same enclosing value match; nested value matches, normally continuing trap-capable operations, unproved loops, and breaks to non-enclosing loops cannot silently satisfy the outer arm.

One closed mandatory direct-iadd.sat integer-table calculus decides source acceptance. Its base derivation grants no optimizer authority; optional facts require a separately approved independently verified family.
The general parser accepts ordinary typed children and one early structural pass enforces and attributes the semantic subset.
Only top-level function signatures gain closed-unit visibility; all other declarations stay lexical.
Ordered logical source records preserve exact input identity and source boundaries without concatenation, path sorting, imports, or namespaces.
A closed source-EBNF diagnostic machine makes rule, coordinate, and expected-terminal selection independent of parser implementation.

hostile_review_bindings.verdict: GO for owner-approval presentation of the reviewed successor/frontend delta

GO for presentation of the exact FORM-2 migration artifacts
GO for the reviewed FORM-5/FORM-7, FN-1/TYPE-6, PRE-1, and EX-1 deltas
GO for exact A-to-B-to-C composition, final protected postimages, and all five FN-4 outcomes

v0_8_discrepancy_accounting.install_action: Preserve every v0.8 record unchanged and generate a version-bound v0.9 discrepancy registry after approval; a candidate resolution does not rewrite history.

v0_8_reference_classification.scope: Tracked non-archive, non-MCTS, non-grammar-verifier files containing v0.8, v08, or the exact v0.8 digest; version-named path-only assets are covered by the preserved directory prefixes; the four live MCTS nodes are listed explicitly in the update inventory.
v0_8_reference_classification.canonical_path_encoding: UTF-8 paths sorted bytewise, each followed by LF

successor_additive_tests_required: the primary and independent FORM-2 renderers produce byte-identical repair and migration patches over all 293 protected and pinned sources
all expanded fixed lowercase token spellings reject in every IDENT binding position
deref(p) and deref(x) have exactly one proposal derivation through fixed place syntax
ordinary let, try let, statement match, value match, broad requires entries, and broad law arguments each have their exact typed derivation
finite f32 and f64 spellings use exact rational round-to-nearest-ties-to-even membership, signed zero, shortest byte count, and ASCII tie breaking without host float formatting
unknown law names, wrong roles, incomplete-domain evidence, and sampling publish no optimizer fact
FN-8 rejects every direct child outside ordinary-let-star followed by one final check before recursively checking that child
top-level forward calls and mutual recursion resolve from the closed signature table
locals, regions, labels, and constants still reject lexical use before declaration
source bundle order, duplicate and invalid paths, zero records, zero-byte records, one-LF records, repartitioning, and empty-record retention have the exact PROG-2 outcome
raw lexical, terminal-membership, grammar, and FORM-2 failures produce the exact DIAG-1 rule, coordinate, expected-terminal set, and non-fabricated location family in independent models
